chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 117 – Nazool (Arrival) of Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>

parts.text: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الْحَسَنِيُّ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ
عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ
عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْخُزَاعِيِّ

text: لَمَّا أُقْدِمَتْ بِنْتُ يَزْدَجَرْدَ عَلَى عُمَرَ أَشْرَفَ لَهَا عَذَارَى الْمَدِينَةِ وَ أَشْرَقَ الْمَسْجِدُ بِضَوْئِهَا لَمَّا دَخَلَتْهُ فَلَمَّا نَظَرَ إِلَيْهَا عُمَرُ غَطَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَ قَالَتْ أُفٍّ بِيرُوجْ بَادَا هُرْمُزْ فَقَالَ عُمَرُ أَ تَشْتِمُنِي هَذِهِ وَ هَمَّ بِهَا فَقَالَ لَهُ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) لَيْسَ ذَلِكَ لَكَ خَيِّرْهَا رَجُلًا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ احْسُبْهَا بِفَيْئِهِ

فَخَيَّرَهَا فَجَاءَتْ حَتَّى وَضَعَتْ يَدَهَا عَلَى رَأْسِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لَهَا أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ مَا اسْمُكِ فَقَالَتْ جَهَانْ شَاهُ فَقَالَ لَهَا أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بَلْ شَهْرَبَانُوَيْهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لِلْحُسَيْنِ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ لَتَلِدَنَّ لَكَ مِنْهَا خَيْرُ أَهْلِ الْأَرْضِ فَوَلَدَتْ عَلِيَّ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ كَانَ يُقَالُ لِعَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) ابْنُ الْخِيَرَتَيْنِ فَخِيَرَةُ اللَّهِ مِنَ الْعَرَبِ هَاشِمٌ وَ مِنَ الْعَجَمِ فَارِسُ .
وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ أَبَا الْأَسْوَدِ الدُّؤَلِيَّ قَالَ فِيهِ : وَ إِنَّ غُلَاماً بَيْنَ كِسْرَى وَ هَاشِمٍ * لَأَكْرَمُ مَنْ نِيطَتْ عَلَيْهِ التَّمَائِمُ

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Al Hassan Al Hassany, and Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Abdullah, altogether from Ibrahim Bin Is’haq Al Ahmar, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abdullah Al Khuzaie, from Nasr Bin Muzahim, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the daughter of Yazdjard was brought to Umar, the young girls of Al-Medina flocked to see her<sup>asws</sup> and the Masjid sparkled by her<sup>asws</sup> illumination when she<sup>asws</sup> entered it. So when Umar looked at her<sup>asws</sup>, she<sup>asws</sup> covered-up her<sup>asws</sup> face and she<sup>asws</sup> said (in Persian), ‘Uff! May the Hurmuz turn black!’ So Umar said, ‘Is this one insulting me?’, and he was concerned with it. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘That is not for you. Give her the choice of a man from the Muslims, and count her<sup>asws</sup> as his share of the booty’,

So he gave her<sup>asws</sup> the choice, and she<sup>asws</sup> came over until she<sup>asws</sup> placed her<sup>asws</sup> hand upon the head of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said to her<sup>asws</sup>: ‘What is your name?’ So she<sup>asws</sup> said, ‘Jahan Shah’. So Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said to her<sup>asws</sup>: ‘But, (It is) ‘Shehr-bano’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said to Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>: ‘O Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>! You<sup>asws</sup> will be Blessed from her<sup>asws</sup>, the best of the people of the Earth’. So she<sup>asws</sup> was Blessed with Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, and it used to be said for Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Son of the two best ones’. So the Chosen one of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> from the Arabs was Hashim<sup>as</sup>, and from the non-Arabs was Persia’.
And it is reported that Abu Al-Aswad Al-Dawwaly said regarding it, ‘And the boy is between Chosroe and Hashim. The honourable one upon whom amulets are stitched’.
en.sarwar: Ali ibn al-Husayn was born in the year thirty eight AH. He passed away in the year ninety five at the age of fifty seven. His mother was Slama daughter of Yazdjurd ibn Sharyar ibn Shiruwayh ibn kisra ‘A Perwiz. Yazdjurd was the last Persian king.
